# RMMZ Mod Loader (RPG Maker MZ Mod Loader) v4.0.0

> In-game mod manager for RPG Maker MZ (RMMZ): manage local mods and Steam Workshop mods — toggle, edit parameters, reorder with dependency checks, drag-and-drop install. Multilingual UI (Simplified Chinese / Traditional Chinese / English), dark/warm themes. Config saved in `mod_config.json` (not `plugins.js`).

> RMMZ 模组管理器 v4：游戏内管理本地/Steam 创意工坊 Mod，开关、参数编辑、依赖检测与排序、拖放安装；多语言界面与双主题；配置写入 `mod_config.json`（不写 `plugins.js`）。

RMMZ Mod Loader runs inside the game and provides an in-game menu to manage mods.  
It only registers `.js` plugins; to inject data into the game database at runtime, a separate data-injection mod is required.

## Key features

- In-game mod management (no external tools)
- **Local mods** and **Steam Workshop mods** (scan `workshop/content/<AppID>/`)
- Enable/disable mods; rich parameter editor (number, boolean, string, select, color, note, database refs, struct, table)
- Reorder load order by drag-and-drop or index; `@base` / `@orderAfter` dependency checks
- Drag-and-drop install of `.js` mods or a `mods/` folder (local mods only)
- Multilingual UI: `config/language/zh_CN.json`, `zh_TW.json`, `en.json`
- Dark / warm themes; preferences in `modloader_config.json`
- Config persisted in `mod_config.json` — survives official `plugins.js` resets
- `@text` aliases for localized parameter display names
- `@define-schema` / `@schema` templates for struct/table parameters

## Documentation

- [README (Chinese)](https://github.com/jokerBBC/rpg-maker-mz-mod-loader#readme): Overview, installation, usage
- [README (English)](https://github.com/jokerBBC/rpg-maker-mz-mod-loader/blob/main/README-en.md): English guide
- [Changelog](https://github.com/jokerBBC/rpg-maker-mz-mod-loader/blob/main/js/mods/docs/modloader_CHANGELOG.md): Release history
- [User guide (Chinese)](https://github.com/jokerBBC/rpg-maker-mz-mod-loader/blob/main/js/mods/docs/%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E6%89%8B%E5%86%8C.md): Player / mod author manual (includes Workshop packaging)
- [ModLoader dev guide](https://github.com/jokerBBC/rpg-maker-mz-mod-loader/blob/main/js/mods/docs/RMMZ_ModLoader_%E5%BC%80%E5%8F%91%E8%A7%84%E8%8C%83.md): Internal development spec (Chinese)

## Example Mods

- [TestMod.js](https://github.com/jokerBBC/rpg-maker-mz-mod-loader/blob/main/js/mods/_localmods/TestMod/TestMod.js): Basic parameter type tests
- [TestSchemaMod.js](https://github.com/jokerBBC/rpg-maker-mz-mod-loader/blob/main/js/mods/_localmods/TestSchemaMod/TestSchemaMod.js): struct/table and @schema examples
- [mydrop.js](https://github.com/jokerBBC/rpg-maker-mz-mod-loader/blob/main/js/mods/_localmods/mydrop/mydrop.js): Practical mod – monster drop extensions
